findings.evidence: `Deck.lean:163-181` proves identity/product/restriction homomorphism directly; `Mathlib/GroupTheory/GroupAction/SubMulAction.lean:300-341` already gives the inherited action on any `SubMulAction`, and `Deck.lean:38-42` adds the generic continuity instance needed to upgrade each action map to a homeomorphism.
findings.fix: First define a generic `SubMulAction.homeomorph`/`homeomorphHom` for `[Group G] [MulAction G M] [TopologicalSpace M] [ContinuousConstSMul G M] (s : SubMulAction G M)`, then derive `fiberHomeomorphHom` from `fiberSubMulAction`.
findings.issue: `fiberHomeomorphHom` and its `one`/`mul` lemmas are specialized to `Deck p` fibres, but the argument only uses a group action on an invariant subtype with `ContinuousConstSMul`.

summary: The fibre action itself is at the intended deck level, but the restriction homomorphism is proved as a deck-fibre special case of a generic invariant-subtype construction.
